issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly handle error scenarios such as missing files or unsupported formats, limiting robustness.
The documentation contains extensive explanatory text and multiple code snippets, making it verbose and potentially overwhelming.
The skill assumes a Python runtime and specific libraries, which may not be available on all AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: extract-invoice-pdf
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items with explicit regex for every field, proper DataFrame handling, and file outputs, while Response B omits a regex-based vendor extraction, falling short of the rubric requirement.

scenarios.name: extract-contacts-docx
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits department and phone columns, while Response B lacks table handling, deduplication, and the required CSV columns.
